morse_word_read_label: Which option shows the word written by the Morse code?
Read the Morse code and select the matching word option.
Which labeled word option matches the Morse code shown above?
Choose the option that spells the word encoded by the Morse code.
Which option letter gives the word represented by the Morse-code symbols?
word_morse_match_label: Which option shows the Morse code for the word shown above?
Select the Morse-code option that matches the displayed word.
Which labeled Morse-code card encodes the source word?
Choose the option whose Morse-code symbols spell the word shown above.
Which option letter matches the source word in Morse code?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_morse_word_read_label: a clean Morse-code word card above four labeled word options
a notebook-style Morse-code word card above four labeled word options
an exam-scan-style Morse-code word card above four labeled word options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_word_morse_match_labe: a clean source word above four labeled Morse-code options
a notebook-style source word above four labeled Morse-code options
an exam-scan-style source word above four labeled Morse-code options
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_morse_word_read_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_code" and "selected_option", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_morse_word_read_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_word_morse_match_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_word" and "selected_option", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_word_morse_match_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
